name: chain_the_biggest_ai_opportunity_right_now_is_
method:
the biggest AI opportunity right now is mid-market companies ($5M-$50M+ revenue):

• too big for cookie-cutter solutions
• too small for enterprise consulting 
• drowning in manual workflows
• have bu

stages.task: Scrape job boards + company DBs for mid-market companies posting manual-workflow roles (data entry, reporting, spreadsheet ops)
Score each company 0-10 on AI readiness: legacy stack, manual job count, revenue band, no existing AI vendor detected
Generate 1-page AI workflow audit proposal per qualified lead using their specific pain signals from job postings
Send personalized cold email with audit proposal to founder/ops lead. Use objection handling from procedural memory.
